Who I Am

18 years in product. I've built systems at scale, led creative teams, and shipped things people actually use. Now I build AI brand photography systems that make businesses look like they have a $50K creative budget.

— Alex Lamb, Creative Director

The Problem

You need content. Real content costs $15–50K per photoshoot. AI slop looks like AI slop. You need someone who makes AI look real.

Portfolio

6 Brand Styles. Built and Running.

CULT BRAND
Restaurants · Food Trucks · Nightlife
Direct flash photography with analog grit. Built for brands that want a cult following, not a corporate look.
LUX
Real Estate · Airbnb · Architecture · Wellness
Cinematic wide shots where the space is the star. Built for premium properties, listings, and luxury brands.
CLEAN DTC
Fashion · Skincare · DTC Products
Clean studio lighting with nothing extra in frame. Built for brands that sell through restraint, not noise.
UGC / LIFESTYLE
Restaurants · Coffee Shops · Consumer Brands
Candid product-in-hand moments that feel like a real customer shot it. Built for authenticity, not polish.
EDITORIAL
Fashion · Automotive · Campaigns · Magazines
Dramatic lighting and intentional framing that belongs in a magazine spread. Built for brands that want to be taken seriously.
CINEMATIC
Bars · Hotels · Nightlife · Music · Events
CineStill 800T neon and moody color grading. Built for brands that come alive after dark.

What You Get

Everything You Need to Launch

Brand DNA Document

Colors, typography, photography style, lighting specification, visual identity system.

50+ AI-Generated Images

Hero shots, product photography, lifestyle, environmental, and detail frames. Production-ready.

30-Day Content Calendar

Scripted captions, hashtag strategy, and a posting schedule built around your audience.

Content Automation Setup

Airtable content queue with auto-posting integration. Optional add-on for full autopilot.

Brand Style Guide

Film stock references, camera settings, prompt formulas, and visual rules your team can follow.

Lead Magnet Pack

10–20 prompt cards as a branded PDF, ready to use for list building and lead capture.
